subject: XM Radio Online - Important Registration Information
body:
jeffrey , 

Thanks for registering for XM Radio Online. 

To complete the registration process, please navigate to the following link. 

http://xmro.xmradio.com/xstream/api/email_activation.jsp?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&password=QAFIDineGTA%3D&trialPromoCode=DEFAULT&standalone=zT7m1xqH1rY%3D&ep=XMROUS  

**************************************** 
Registration Information
Email: jeeproject@yahoo.com 
**************************************** 

Welcome to Radio to the Power of X! 
The XM Radio Online Team 

___________________________________________________________ 
Note: Please do not respond to this email. If you have questions or comments, please go to: http://www.xmradio.com/contact_us/xmro_contact_us.jsp
